<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Thoroughly review the Google oidc implementation on this branch, comparing it to the other existing similar implementations here, along with the relevant Google documentation and authoritative guidance
I’m reviewing the branch solely against the repository’s documented standards and the requested smell baseline, with special attention to the Google/GitHub/Fly issuer seams. I’ll keep this read-only.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md && git status --short --branch && git diff --stat origin/main...HEAD && git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"for f in CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md CONTEXT.md docs/service-contract.md docs/implementation.md; do echo \"### $f\"; sed -n '1,260p' \"$f\"; done","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff --unified=60 origin/main...HEAD -- packages/oidc/src/issuer-adapter.ts packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/src/issuer.ts packages/oidc-issuer-fly/src/issuer.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/oidc-issuers.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/fly-machine-token-policy-rule.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/github-actions-token-policy-rule.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/dependencies.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,160p' packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts && git diff --unified=25 origin/main...HEAD -- test/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.test.ts test/authentication.test.ts test/oidc-issuers.test.ts packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/test/issuer.test.ts SECURITY.md CONTEXT.md docs/service-contract.md docs/implementation.md README.md && nl -ba CONTRIBUTING.md | sed -n '1,80p' && nl -ba docs/implementation.md | sed -n '1,170p'","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"nl -ba CONTEXT.md | sed -n '10,48p'; nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/src/issuer.ts; nl -ba workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.ts; nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-fly/src/issuer.ts | sed -n '78,110p'; nl -ba workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/fly-machine-token-policy-rule.ts | sed -n '27,48p'; nl -ba packages/oidc/src/issuer-adapter.ts; nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts | sed -n '15,42p'","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git show origin/main:CONTEXT.md | nl -ba | sed -n '10,28p'; git diff --check origin/main...HEAD; git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output);

content.text: Standards review completed and sent to the parent agent: one hard documentation-contract violation and two judgment-call design smells. No files were changed.
